ODDMELT-WOVEN.title: Woven
ODDMELT-WOVEN.description: This card is not reshuffled from your discard pile into your draw pile.
ODDMELT-PERSIST.title: Persist
ODDMELT-PERSIST.description: This card returns to your hand when played a certain number of times each turn.
ODDMELT-STITCH.title: Stitch
ODDMELT-STITCH.description: When played, attaches to a random card in your hand. Whenever you play that card, this card is also played.
ODDMELT-STITCHED.title: Stitched
ODDMELT-STITCHED.description: Attached to another card. Whenever you play that card, this card is also played.
